title: Attila
writer: Ennio De Concini, Frank Gervasi, Richard C. Sarafian
actors: Anthony Quinn, Sophia Loren, Henri Vidal
plot: Attila, the leader of the barbarian Huns and called by the Romans "The Scourge of God", sweeps onto the Italian peninsula, defeating all of the armies of Rome, until he and his men reach the gates of the city itself.
